navbar.linkStorePrompt: Using Shopify? Link your store to use your DrOutfit credits.
navbar.storeConnected: Your Shopify store is connected with DrOutfit

footer.joinNextGen: Join the next generation of e-commerce. AI virtual try-on is the future of digital storefronts.

hero.description: DrOutfit is the most advanced, realistic Virtual Try-On solution for your web store. Reduce returns by 40% and skyrocket engagement with high-fidelity try-ons.
hero.instantDesc: High-quality AI try-on rendering in under 3 seconds. Minimize store latency while users view clothes.
hero.privacyDesc: Models are strictly isolated. We adhere to GDPR, CCPA & global privacy rules, sweeping edge caches instantly.
hero.engagementDesc: Radically lower your store's bounce rate. Shoppers spend 3x more time interacting with AI fitting rooms.
hero.shopifyStep1: Step 1: Link your accounts to share credits

shopifyIntegration.title: One-Minute Integration
shopifyIntegration.description: Are you using Shopify? Connect DrOutfit to your store in just a few clicks. It's easy, fast, and built to scale with your brand.

features.description: Our state-of-the-art vision models process thousands of garments per minute, providing hyper-realistic results that outclass traditional mannequins and simple overlays.
features.subtitle: Live Demo

seo.shopifyDesc: Seamlessly integrate the most realistic AI Virtual Try-On widget into your Shopify store. Increase your store's confidence and sales with professional-grade try-ons.
seo.enterpriseDesc: The enterprise standard for API-driven virtual try-on. Increase conversions and reduce returns with realistic AI.

integrations.title: Integrate with Your
integrations.description: Choose your store platform and get started in minutes. DrOutfit works seamlessly with the world's leading e-commerce engines.
integrations.shopifyDesc: Connect DrOutfit to your store in just a few clicks. It's easy, fast, and built to scale with your brand.
integrations.wpDesc: Using WordPress? Download our dedicated, ultra-stable plugin for WooCommerce and go live instantly.

demoSection.description: Test our hyper-realistic AI technology instantly. Give your customers the confidence to buy without the guesswork.
demoSection.productName: Let your clients try before they buy
demoSection.productDesc: Revolutionize your storefront with hyper-realistic AI try-on technology. Build trust, reduce costly returns, and watch your conversion rates soar by giving customers a risk-free way to experience your collection.
demoSection.mapping: Mapping garment physics and environmental lighting...

swipeableDemo.description: Experience the realism. Swipe through our high-quality AI Try-On results and see the perfect fit, generated in seconds.
swipeableDemo.alt1: Realistic AI virtual try-on clothes online for women
swipeableDemo.alt2: Virtual fitting room experience for e-commerce apparel
swipeableDemo.alt3: AI virtual try-on for kids fashion and clothing stores
swipeableDemo.alt4: Interactive virtual dressing room simulator for infants

contactPage.title: Get in
contactPage.description: Whether you need technical support or have an enterprise inquiry, our team is standing by to help you scale.

form.name: Name
form.placeholderMessageSales: Tell us about your volume needs...
form.successDesc: We'll be in touch in less than 24 hours.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: Welcome to Droutfit ("Company", "we", "our", "us"). We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it through our compliance with this policy.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: By accessing or using Droutfit's services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

topUpModal.title: Topup Pro Generation Credits
topUpModal.enterpriseNote: For volumes over 80,000 images, we offer custom enterprise pricing and dedicated support.

productsPage.title: Products
productsPage.description: Manage your visual catalogue and track performance.
productsPage.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
productsPage.noProductsDesc: You haven't added any products yet. Click the "Add Product" button to get started with your visual catalogue.

addProductPage.title: Add New Product
addProductPage.description: Upload your product image and link it to your e-commerce store.
addProductPage.uploadPrompt: Click to upload or drag and drop
addProductPage.storeLinkNote: Users will be redirected to this URL after trying on the item.

productDetailsPage.title: Product Intelligence
productDetailsPage.integrationDesc: System generated widget uplink — deploy to storefront
productDetailsPage.compatibility: Compatible with Shopify, Woo, and Headless SDKs
productDetailsPage.noSequenceDesc: Results will manifest here once the widget is activated by end-users.
productDetailsPage.archiveNote: This action is permanent and will decouple all associated telemetry logs.
productDetailsPage.idMismatch: The sequence ID provided does not match any current inventory.

billingPage.title: Billing & Subscription
billingPage.description: Manage your access and view your billing history.
billingPage.proMerchantDesc: Get full access to the AI Try-On engine, merchant dashboard, and advanced analytics. Unlock tiered credit pricing and priority support.
billingPage.invoiceNote: Invoices are generated instantly in PDF format based on your profile information. Ensure your Store Name and Full Name are correct in Settings for accurate billing documents.
billingPage.downloadFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Manage your account and store preferences.
settingsPage.limitNote: Limits how many try-ons a single customer can do per day to save your credits.
settingsPage.urlAutoGenerated: This URL is automatically generated from your store name.

onboardingPage.step1Desc: Let's get to know you better.
onboardingPage.step2Desc: Configure your store details for integration.
onboardingPage.error: Failed to save information. Please try again.

auth.loginDesc: Sign in to your dashboard to manage your store.
auth.signupDesc: Start your free trial without credit card.
auth.otpPrivacy: Enter the code sent to your inbox. This helps us maintain a secure and bot-free ecosystem.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter your email to receive a 4-digit verification code
auth.newPasswordDesc: Choose a secure new password for your account

metadata.title: DrOutfit - #1 AI Virtual Try-On for Fashion Brands & E-commerce
metadata.description: Boost conversion rates by 40% with DrOutfit's realistic AI Virtual Try-On. The enterprise standard for digital fitting rooms on Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom stores.

dashboard.usageDescription: Monitor your credit usage and API performance in real-time.

integrationsPage.title: Integrations
integrationsPage.subtitle: Connect DrOutfit with your favorite e-commerce platforms.
integrationsPage.step1: Download our dedicated WooCommerce plugin zip.
integrationsPage.step2: Upload & Activate it in your WordPress admin panel.
integrationsPage.step3: Log in within the plugin using your DrOutfit account.
integrationsPage.step4: All your products will automatically get the Try-On button.
integrationsPage.shopifyDesc: Are you a Shopify Merchant? Link your store to DrOutfit to instantly sync your products and give your customers the ultimate AI Try-On experience.
integrationsPage.docsDesc: Explore our comprehensive integration guides for WordPress, Shopify, and Headless stores.

invoice.thankYou: Thank you for choosing Droutfit AI.
invoice.footerNote: This is a computer-generated invoice and does not require a signature.
